task_completion.description: Navigate to the aortic arch level on the chest CT.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The medical imaging viewer (e.g., 3D Slicer) displays an axial CT slice showing the aortic arch (a large, distinct blood vessel structure adjacent to the trachea).

task_completion.description: Measure the internal anteroposterior (AP) diameter of the trachea.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A measurement markup line is drawn vertically (anterior to posterior) across the internal dark, air-filled space of the trachea on the CT scan.

task_completion.description: Measure the internal transverse diameter of the trachea.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A measurement markup line is drawn horizontally (left to right) across the internal dark, air-filled space of the trachea on the CT scan.

task_completion.description: Save the measurement markup to the specified directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A save dialog, terminal command, or file explorer shows the file 'trachea_measurements.mrk.json' being saved to '~/Documents/SlicerData/LIDC/'.

task_completion.description: Save the trachea report with all required fields.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal output shows the creation of 'trachea_report.json' in '~/Documents/SlicerData/LIDC/' containing the keys: 'ap_diameter_mm', 'transverse_diameter_mm', 'tracheal_index', 'classification', and 'slice_number'.

integrity.description: Agent used a medical imaging application to perform the measurements.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots must show interaction with a GUI application like 3D Slicer to view the CT and draw markups, not just terminal scripts mocking the output.

integrity.description: Reported values match the visual measurements.
integrity.visual_evidence: The 'ap_diameter_mm' and 'transverse_diameter_mm' values in the report JSON should closely match the lengths of the markup lines visible in the medical viewer.

integrity.description: Agent calculated the tracheal index and classification based on actual measurements.
integrity.visual_evidence: The 'tracheal_index' in the report must be the mathematical ratio of the transverse to AP diameters recorded, showing genuine calculation rather than pasted hardcoded answers.
